definition:
1. to put  a door to : Pass., perfect participle ἐπικεκλῖμέναι σανίδες closed  doors, (Iliad by Homer) 
2. to bend towards , τὰ ὦτα ἐπ. to prick  the ears, (Xenophon Historicus):—; Pass., κεραῖαι ἐπικεκλιμέναι spars inclined at an angle to  the wall, (Thucydides) 
3. intransitive to incline towards , πρός τι (Demosthenes Orator) 
4. Pass. to lie over against  a place, with dative, (Euripides) 
5. in Pass., also, to lie down at table , [variant datesAnthology Palantina (ML)
